data.title: Soldier held for $400K bet on Maduro raid. Tether records largest freeze ever. SBF withdraws trial bid as Trump critiques global gambling.
data.description: Former President Trump commented on the global economy, labeling it as a large casino. Tether, a popular cryptocurrency, initiated its largest enforcement freeze to date. Additionally, prominent figure SBF decided to withdraw his recent attempt to start a new legal proceeding.

data.title: Changan Group Unveils Updated "Vast Ocean Plan 2.0" and highlight Next-Generation BlueCore Hybrid at Auto China 2026
data.description: Changan Group has announced its Vast Ocean Plan 2.0 as part of its "1+4+4+5" strategy for global expansion and innovation. The company is focusing on seven operational upgrades and developing next-generation hybrid technology. The plan was revealed in Beijing on April 24, 2026, at Auto China.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Cookeville Regional Medical Center Under Investigation for Data Breach of Over 330,000 Records
data.description: An investigation is underway by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP into a data breach affecting 337,917 individuals associated with Cookeville Regional Medical Center in Tennessee. This breach resulted in unauthorized access to sensitive information. Cookeville Regional Medical Center is a hospital with 289...

data.title: Linxon Launches Stability Ready™ to accelerate power availability for Data Centers and Utilities
data.description: Today, Linxon introduced Stability Ready™, an innovative set of power solutions aimed at supporting data centers and utilities in ensuring efficient and reliable electricity supply during a time of record-high demand. This new portfolio is designed to enhance grid resilience and guarantee quick power access. The announcement took place in Raleigh, N.C. on April 24, 2026.

data.title: Western Union Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Denver, The Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) released its first-quarter 2026 financial results, reporting a revenue of $983 million, showing no change compared to the previous year on a GAAP basis. However, adjusted revenue witnessed a 1% decrease. This shift in adjusted revenue was mainly influenced by the expansion in Consumer Services and Branded Digital divisions, partially counterbalanced by macroeconomic challenges in the Americas retail sector. The company expressed satisfaction with the first-quarter outcomes.

data.title: Expedia Names Ex-Snap Exec As Finance Chief
data.description: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) saw an increase in shares during Friday's premarket trading session after announcing Derek Andersen as their new Chief Financial Officer starting May 11, 2026. Andersen, who previously held the CFO position at Snap Inc. (NYSE: SNAP), will be taking over from Scott Schenkel. Schenkel, who has been crucial in strengthening the company's financial position over the past 16 months, will depart after the first earnings call on May 16, 2026. The broader market had a mixed performance on Thursday, with the Nasdaq rising by 0.64% and the Dow Jones falling by 0.33%. Expedia Group is scheduled to release their earnings on May 7, 2026, with an EPS estimate of $1.26, up from the previous estimate of 40.

data.title: Metaplanet secures $50M in interest-free bonds for Bitcoin acquisition, bolstering capital markets-driven strategy.
data.description: Metaplanet has secured $50 million in funding through zero-interest bonds from EVO FUND. The purpose of this financial boost is to further grow its Bitcoin treasury as part of its capital markets-based accumulation approach.
ISRAELI MILITARY ORDERS EVACUATION OF SOUTHERN LEBANESE TOWN, CLAIMING STRIKES WILL OCCUR IN THAT AREA.

data.title: Dingdong Files Its Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Dingdong (Cayman) Limited, a prominent fresh grocery e-commerce company in China listed on NYSE under the symbol DDL, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. The Advanced supply chain capabilities of the company were highlighted in the announcement. The Annual Report is now available for viewing on the Company's investor relations website.

data.title: Myseum.AI to Debut Picture Party for Couples at the Florida Bridal & Wedding Expo
data.description: A company is set to launch Picture Party, a unique private social network designed for couples to document and share their wedding moments instantly with family and friends. This platform provides an exclusive space for couples to create and store memories, with the ability to share photos and videos in real-time. With an estimated user base of thousands of couples, Picture Party aims to revolutionize the way wedding memories are captured and preserved.

data.title: Gulf & Pacific Equities Corp. reports on 2025 Year-End Results with Revenue of $4,627,181, Announces CFO Appointment, Adopts Semi-Annual Financial Reporting, and Refinanced Mortgages Due
data.description: In Toronto, ON as of April 24, 2026, Gulf & Pacific Equities Corp. (TSX-V: GUF) revealed a 1.0% decline in revenue to $4,627,181 for the year ended December 31, 2025. This is down from $4,673,950 during the corresponding period the year before. The company, specializing in acquiring, managing, and developing anchored shopping centers in Western Canada, disclosed these figures.
EXTENSION OF WAIVER WILL BEGIN ON MAY 18 -WHITE HOUSE

data.title: ChoiceOne Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Sparta, Michigan, on April 24, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: COFS), the holding company of ChoiceOne Bank, released its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. A key highlight includes the disclosure of the company's net earnings reaching $13,704,000 during the three-month period.

data.title: HanchorBio Selects Bloomberg to Strengthen its Strategic Intelligence Across Drug Development and Global Biopharma
data.description: HanchorBio, Inc. (TPEx: 7827), a leading biotechnology company, is broadening its data-driven strategy beyond molecule design to include portfolio and market analysis. This expansion was announced in Taipei, Shanghai, and San Francisco on April 24, 2026. HanchorBio is currently a global player in the clinical-stage biotech field, focusing on developing advanced immunotherapies.

data.title: Aetna Announces Progress on Industry Leading Efforts to Simplify Prior Authorization
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, as of April 24, 2026, Aetna, a subsidiary of CVS Health (NYSE: CVS), is taking the lead in prior authorization reform to streamline care access for patients and providers. Aetna revealed that 88% of their processes have been standardized, showcasing their commitment to simplifying healthcare procedures.

data.title: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. disclosed its first-quarter 2026 results today. The company, listed as Nasdaq: PDLB, acts as the holding entity for Ponce Bank, National Association.
